data.title: Improve the B2B buyer experience by creating customer-centric strategies
data.description: While budget and pricing challenges are often cited as reasons for delayed purchases, deeper issues within organizations play a significant role.

data.title: LeafLink acquisition of Leaf Trade to expand reach in wholesale cannabis
data.description: The combined LeafLink and Leaf Trade enterprise is expected to generate an annual gross merchandise volume (GMV) of $9 billion.

data.title: Chewy grows net sales 4.8% in Q3 earnings results
data.description: Quarterly sales remained up at Chewy despite a 0.5% decline year over year in active customers.

data.title: Sears partners with Amazon Business to streamline appliance repairs
data.description: The integration has enabled Sears Home Services to complete over 50,000 orders for appliance parts since implementation six months ago. The collaboration has reduced the average time from customer requests to issue resolution by 15%.

data.title: Walmart and others lose Cyber 5 traffic share
data.description: Many of the largest retailers in the Top 1000 saw traffic shares shrink over the Cyber 5 as shoppers look elsewhere for deals.
